## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation or issue this addresses.

## How

Key implementation details (if non-obvious).

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] New code uses block statements (`{}` for all `if`/`for`/`while`)
- [ ] New features have tests
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, etc.)
